summary: Polish edit-mode scrollbar and sidebar density
description: Fix edit-mode frontend design complaints: the editor scrollbar should belong to the editor surface, footer controls must not overlap content, and sidebar search/nav controls should be calmer/less oversized.
acceptance: Edit mode uses one coherent editor scroll area; save/cancel footer does not cover note text; sidebar search/nav controls are visually smaller and less heavy; browser smoke proves no blank page and relevant layout dimensions.
verification: npm --workspace apps/desktop run build; npm run check; browser DOM/vision smoke

evidence.summary: Frontend design/edit-mode fix complete. Edit mode now hides Item/Frontmatter/Links metadata chrome, document-pane uses edit-specific rows auto/minmax(0,1fr), document-body hides overflow, textarea owns scroll with dark scrollbar, footer is below editor without overlap, sidebar search/nav controls are smaller. Verification: npm --workspace apps/desktop run build; browser DOM forced edit smoke blank=false paneRows='67px 510px' bodyOverflow=hidden textareaOverflow=auto textareaScrollable=true footerOverlapsTextarea=false searchHeight=34 tabHeight=28; browser visual smoke; npm run check; go validate.
